subject: Public Health
title: DALYs: Measuring Health Lost
description: One-minute skill: DALYs: Measuring Health Lost.

hook.text: Death counts miss the full picture—a disease that blinds millions may kill few. DALYs capture both death and disability.

buildup.text: Disability-Adjusted Life Years combine years of life lost to premature death and years lived with disability.

discovery.text: One DALY equals one lost year of healthy life—the higher the DALYs, the greater the disease burden.

twist.text: Depression ranks among the top 10 causes of DALYs globally—despite rarely appearing in death statistics.

climax.text: DALYs help policymakers allocate resources to conditions with the highest total burden—not just the highest mortality.

punchline.text: Health isn't just about staying alive. It's about living well. DALYs count both.

quiz.question: What do DALYs combine?
options: Years of life lost and years lived with disability
Only years of life lost to death
